I'm looking into why the HEAD isn't showing output. It seems the branch commit might not be touching MIA. I probably don't need to inspect with "git ls-tree" since I want the strongest evidence. I need to tread carefully here. The instruction says to stop and ask the user if there are unexpected changes, but I'm already working with a dirty worktree.
